feat: complete 5 remaining tasks — kanren FP suppression, GUI, storage, Chapel

1. Kanren: 6 new context-fact extractors (null_checked, schema_validated,
   enum_args, timeout_protected, path_canonicalized, constant_args) with
   cross-pattern detection and 10 new tests. All 10 suppression rules now
   have matching extractors, targeting ~8% → ~2-3% FP reduction.

2. GUI: File picker (text input + Load button), SystemImage viewer tab
   with color-coded health/risk indicators, TemporalDiff viewer tab with
   trend analysis and before/after comparison grids.

3. VeriSimDB storage: Exponential backoff retry (3 attempts), Bearer auth
   via VERISIM_API_TOKEN, batch push endpoint, query support, gateway
   health check with 30s cache.

4. Chapel: Fingerprint cache JSON parsing (loadFingerprintCacheFromFile),
   attack/adjudicate result integration back into RepoResult with crash
   counts and verdict strings.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix HEAD request auth bypass for static assets (Meta crawler compatibility)

Meta's WhatsApp business verification crawler sends HEAD requests to verify
the website. The auth middleware only skipped GET requests for static assets,
causing HEAD to return 401 — which made Meta disable the business.

commit.message:
fix: stabilize --check, align --export defaults, fix npm diff loop (v1.8.1)

- Fix --check non-determinism by normalizing dates, directory listings,
  and provenance sections; clear existing_content to prevent self-referential
  migration during check
- Align --export default to .md (combined markdown) in both Python and npm;
  Python still supports .tar.gz and .zip when explicitly specified
- Fix infinite loop in npm --diff chunk-based algorithm when comparing
  empty files to new content
- Add telemetry to all standalone commands (--check, --export, --migrate,
  --init, --update, --diff) in both runtimes
- Add 13 Python + 13 npm tests for v1.8.0 features and property-based tests
- Bump all versions to 1.8.1
- Update docs, README, and help text

commit.message:
fix: voice queue serialization — agents speak in order, new messages trigger speech, chat pacing indicator

- Rewrite _playNext() as a true sequential Promise chain: resolve() on all error paths (never reject), direct tail recursion replaces setTimeout gap
- Eliminates race where _playing=false window between finally block and 420ms timeout allowed duplicate chains to start
- Add isPlaying() method for external queue state inspection
- Add speakPulse keyframe for speaking message indicator

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: rename last_seen to last_read in forwarder UI (#139)

## Summary

Renamed "last_seen" terminology to "last_read" throughout forwarder UI
to improve precision: a reader doesn't just get "seen", it sends chip
reads. This terminology better reflects the domain.

## Changes

- Renamed `last_seen_secs` → `last_read_secs` in API types and backend
events
- Renamed formatting functions: `formatLastSeen` → `formatLastRead`,
`computeTickingLastSeen` → `computeTickingLastRead`
- Updated UI label from "Last seen:" to "Last read:"
- Updated all related variable names and test cases

## Test Plan

- ✅ Rust compiles (cargo check)
- ✅ Pre-commit checks pass (formatting, clippy, type checks)
- ✅ No remaining references to old naming

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-authored-by: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Move "Powered by Inkwell" inside profile theme wrapper so it inherits author colors

The footer was rendering outside the profile's CSS variable scope, so it used
site-default colors (light) even on dark-themed profiles — creating an ugly
white bar. Now rendered inside the theme wrapper on both profile and entry pages,
so it automatically picks up --muted from the author's chosen theme.

Also hides the SignupCta on custom domain pages — it's the author's site, not
an Inkwell marketing page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove .claude worktree submodule from git tracking

The .claude/worktrees/ directory was accidentally tracked as a git
submodule (mode 160000), causing the JuliaRegistry Treecheck to fail:
git archive skips submodules, producing a tarball that doesn't match
the git-tree-sha1. Fix: untrack .claude/ and add it to .gitignore.

step, including running ones

Add CLI entry point using commander with four subcommands:
- init: creates .trustbundle/config.json and bundles directory
- build: reads input files via adapter auto-detection, outputs bundle
- verify: re-computes digest and reports valid/invalid (--quiet for CI)
- show: displays human-readable summary (--format json supported)

Also adds vitest.config.ts to exclude dist/ from test runs.

commit.message:
Stabilized MontgomeryATLAS project, verified Gemini copilot, documentation updated, deployment ready

- Add GOOGLE_API_KEY fallback: code now reads GEMINI_API_KEY || GOOGLE_API_KEY
- Update validateEnv.ts to accept either key name without false-positive warnings
- Update AICopilotService constructor log to reflect both key names
- Gemini model confirmed: gemini-2.0-flash on v1beta endpoint

      politique exclusive/shared, intégration réconciliateur
10b - Rôles Ansible IA : ollama_server (LLM) + stt_server (Speaches),
      détection GPU runtime, services systemd
10c - Domaine ai-tools : template dans anklume init, anklume ai status,
      health check HTTP des services IA
10d - Push-to-talk STT : scripts hôte KDE Wayland (pw-record, wtype,
      kdotool), mode streaming, support AZERTY, anklume stt setup/status
10e - Gestion VRAM : anklume ai flush (décharge modèles, arrête
      llama-server), anklume ai switch (accès exclusif GPU par domaine),
      fichier d'état /var/lib/anklume/ai-access.json

data-driven service checks, GpuInfo.none() sentinel, batch wtype,
fix hardcoded instance name, réutilisation check_service_health.

commit.message:
fix: CLOB price fetcher — use get_midpoint for real prices

Three issues fixed:
1. Used outermost book orders (0.001/0.999 dust) for midpoint → always 0.5
   Fix: use client.get_midpoint(token_id) as primary price source
2. Buckets without bids got NULL prices even when asks existed
   Fix: midpoint API works regardless of book shape; fallback to get_price
3. no_price assumed as 1 - yes_price instead of fetching independently
   Fix: fetch NO token midpoint separately via get_midpoint(no_token)
4. Order book best_bid/best_ask were outermost (worst) orders
   Fix: bids are ascending, asks descending — use [-1] for tightest

Results: NYC Mar 9 shows 64-65°F at 32.5%, 66°F+ at 33.8% (was all 0.5).
Spreads now 0.1-3% (was 99.8%). Strategist found 2 entry signals ($5.79).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix call_ollama.sh: timeout with bash function + correct Cloud URL

Two bugs fixed in call_ollama.sh:
1. 'timeout N curl_with_auth' fails — timeout can't call bash functions.
   Fix: replaced with 'curl_with_auth --max-time N' (curl native timeout)
   and inline error handling (removes undefined handle_timeout_or_error).
2. Ollama Cloud URL: https://api.ollama.com redirects 301 → https://ollama.com
   Fix: added -L flag to curl_with_auth to follow redirects, and updated
   all references from api.ollama.com to ollama.com.

Also: remove empty scripts/call_ollama.sh (leftover from old plugin structure).
Rebuild agent-delegator.skill and agent-delegator.zip with fixed scripts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(aq2): background ingestion queue with persistent cross-page status

Server (ingest.py):
- POST /api/ingest now returns job_id immediately and runs pipeline in
  a daemon thread — no more blocking HTTP while docling/GLiNER process
- GET /api/ingest/jobs — list all jobs (most recent first)
- GET /api/ingest/jobs/:id — single job status
- DELETE /api/ingest/jobs — remove finished/errored jobs

Frontend:
- IngestContext (React context + provider) holds job list globally so
  navigating away and back preserves the queue
- Polls GET /api/ingest/jobs every 2s while any job is queued/running,
  stops polling when all jobs are settled
- Sidebar shows a live count badge on the Ingest nav item while uploads
  are in progress
- IngestUI rewritten to use context; file drop submits immediately and
  shows per-job live status (queued → running → done/error)

feat: Level 5 자율 진화 시스템 — 자기수정 + 멀티에이전트 협업 (#156)

* chore: claude-opus-4-5 → claude-sonnet-4-6으로 전환하여 API 비용 1/5 절감

모든 에이전트의 Opus 모델 호출을 Sonnet으로 변경:
- board_agenda_agent: 안건/표결 생성 (2곳)
- diary_board_agent: 이사회 보고서 생성 (1곳)
- kstartup_agent: 적합성 분석 + 신청서 초안 (2곳)
- news_idea_agent: 아이디어 생성 (1곳)
- notion_diary_agent: 일기 요약 (1곳)

예상 비용: $44/주 → ~$9/주

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SjTk7XuGr4yJ3TLKSVxPcP

* 뉴스 아이디어 에이전트, K-Startup 에이전트 스케줄 비활성화

API 비용 절감을 위해 두 워크플로우의 cron 스케줄을 주석처리.
수동 실행(workflow_dispatch)은 유지.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SjTk7XuGr4yJ3TLKSVxPcP

* disable invest agents to reduce API costs

InvestAgent(백테스트 진화)와 InvestReportAgent(뉴스 리포트) 비활성화

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SjTk7XuGr4yJ3TLKSVxPcP

* feat: Level 5 자율 진화 시스템 — 자기수정 + 멀티에이전트 협업

Level 4 자기수정 (SelfImprover):
- 실패 패턴 감지 → 코드 분석 → AI 수정안 생성 → 테스트 → 커밋
- 안전장치: 수정 불가 파일 목록, 구문검사, 롤백, 일일 한도
- 위험 패턴 탐지 (eval/exec/시크릿 접근 차단)

Level 5 멀티에이전트 (AgentFactory + TaskDelegation + AgentEvaluator):
- AgentFactory: AI가 에이전트 코드 생성 → 구문검사 → 동적 로드 → 런타임 시작/정지/폐기
- TaskDelegation: 작업 위임 → 데드라인 → 결과 콜백 → 자동 재위임
- AgentEvaluator: 전체 에이전트 성과 평가 → 등급(A~F) → 부진 에이전트 해고/재생성

ProactiveAgent 통합:
- observe()에 self_improve, evaluate_agents, check_delegations, consider_spawn_agent 액션 추가
- handle_external_task()로 다른 에이전트의 작업 요청 수신
- 6시간마다 자기수정, 12시간마다 조직 평가, 4시간마다 에이전트 생성 검토

Orchestrator:
- 동적 에이전트 자동 시작 (start_all_active)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01SjTk7XuGr4yJ3TLKSVxPcP

commit.message:
feat: colorize clock drift by magnitude (#141)

Color-code the clock drift value in the forwarder UI based on absolute
magnitude:
- Green (<100ms) — excellent sync
- Yellow (100-499ms) — acceptable drift
- Red (≥500ms) — needs attention

Adds `driftColorClass()` helper in status-view-model.ts and wires it
into the clock drift display. Includes comprehensive tests for all
thresholds and boundary values.

record rather than being eagerly removed.

- Restrict TwoLevelCacheManager to pre-registered cache names only
- Add partial-cache lookup for batch content tag queries

tracking, and direct event publishing in PlaylistService for update
and delete operations. Convert PlaylistTest.Update to use PlaylistFixture
consistently and add domain-level event registration tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(playlist): add Playlist CRUD request/response DTOs

and PlaylistResponse records with factory methods and tests.

* feat(playlist): add CachingPlaylistReader and auto-configuration

Add PlaylistCacheEntry, CachingPlaylistReader with event-based cache
eviction, and CachingPlaylistAutoConfig. Register PLAYLISTS cache name
and configure TTL in cache.yaml.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat(playlist): add PlaylistFacade

Add PlaylistFacade with batch-optimized getAll, getById, create,
update, and transactional delete with associated data cleanup.
Refactor ReviewFacade to delegate user resolution to UserService.

Add REST controller with GET /api/playlists, GET /api/playlists/{id},
POST (201), PATCH, DELETE (204) endpoints. All endpoints require
authentication via @AuthenticationPrincipal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(test): add PlaylistFacade mock to GlobalExceptionHandlerTest

@WebMvcTest without controller specification loads all controllers,
requiring PlaylistFacade bean after PlaylistController was added.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(cache): wrap event-publishing calls in transaction boundary

ContentFacade.delete() and PlaylistFacade.update() published domain
events outside an active transaction, causing @TransactionalEventListener
(AFTER_COMMIT) cache eviction to silently skip execution.

  priority bucket calibration, context flag impact, score component
  correlations with realized returns
- error_analysis.py: worst performers by asset/rule/event type, tail loss
  trade listing, skip analysis, flag-loss correlation, and ranked
  actionable recommendations
- clustering_service: use article published_at as cluster first_seen_at
  so backdated articles produce historically-accurate signal dates
- cluster_analysis_service: propagate cluster.first_seen_at to
  ClusterEvent and ClusterTradeIdea created_at for correct signal dating
- seed_historical_articles: 20 backdated test articles spanning Apr 2025
  to Feb 2026 for backtest coverage

fix: dep search dropdown escapes section overflow clipping

Append dropdown to document.body with position:fixed so it isn't
clipped by .modal-body section { overflow: hidden }. Track it in a
global depDropdown ref and clean up on modal close or rebuild.
Also fix button appearing below input (removed inline flexDirection:column).

commit.message:
Add Claude bot to auto-fix GitHub issues

Polls GitHub every 1hr for issues assigned to the bot user, calls Claude Opus 4.6 to fix the code, pushes to GitHub (triggering Vercel auto-deploy), then comments and closes the issue.

Add Ascendant (Lagna) calculation from date + lat/lon

- getAscendant({ date, lat, lon }) computes sidereal rising sign
- Uses Meeus GMST + ecliptic-horizon intersection formula
- Returns rashi, nakshatra, pada, degree, and LST
- skyDataForPrompt() now accepts optional ascendant parameter
- Example includes birth chart with house mapping
- 39 tests passing (11 new for ascendant)
- README updated with full Lagna API docs
